index.meta.title: DevAI Day Workshop
index.meta.description: Learn how to use GitHub Copilot effectively with hands-on exercises. Choose your learning path: Start Coding with AI or explore Copilot Pro Features.
index.hero.title: DevAI Day Workshop
index.hero.subtitle: Master AI-powered coding with GitHub Copilot. Learn how to leverage your AI pair programmer through hands-on exercises and real-world examples.
index.about.title: About the Workshop
index.about.subtitle: Everything you need to get started with GitHub Copilot
index.goals.title: Today's Goals
index.goals.item1: Understand the various features of GitHub Copilot
index.goals.item2: Develop a complete application using agent mode
index.goals.item3: Learn how to use Copilot across the GitHub platform
index.goals.item4: Master advanced Copilot features for professional development
index.prerequisites.title: Prerequisites
index.prerequisites.item1: Visual Studio Code is installed on your machine
index.prerequisites.item2: GitHub Copilot license is available and activated
index.prerequisites.item3: GitHub account is set up and ready to use
index.prerequisites.note: Attending in person? Review the full setup guide — including per-path requirements — and get everything installed in advance:
index.paths.title: Choose Your Learning Path
index.paths.subtitle: Select the path that best matches your learning goals
index.path1.title: Start Coding with AI
index.path1.description: Learn IDE-based Copilot features through hands-on exercises. Perfect for developers new to AI-assisted coding who want to master the fundamentals.
index.path2.title: Copilot Pro Features
index.path2.description: Explore advanced Copilot features for professional development workflows. Ideal for developers ready to leverage AI across the entire development lifecycle.
index.path3.title: Extended Copilot Capabilities
index.path3.description: Go beyond the IDE and explore the broader Copilot ecosystem — CLI, SDK, agent extensibility, and memory. Ideal for developers who have completed Path 1 or Path 2.
index.path4.title: Spec-Driven Development
index.path4.description: Write specs first, then let Copilot plan, break down tasks, and implement. An advanced track for experienced developers, blending concepts with GitHub Spec Kit.
index.path5.title: Agentic Workflows
index.path5.description: Build AI-powered automation with GitHub Agentic Workflows (gh-aw) — natural language markdown compiled into hardened GitHub Actions. An advanced, hands-on track.
index.resources.title: Additional Resources
index.resources.subtitle: Continue your learning journey
index.resources.docs.title: Documentation
index.resources.docs.description: Explore the official GitHub Copilot documentation for detailed guides and reference materials.
index.resources.bestPractices.title: Best Practices
index.resources.bestPractices.descriptio: Learn tips and best practices for getting the most out of GitHub Copilot in your workflow.
index.resources.awesome.title: Awesome Copilot
index.resources.awesome.description: Discover a curated collection of examples, tools, and community resources for Copilot.
